summary: Iteration 47: Complete testing of PDF Template Unification and EN 1090 FPC System. All 27 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all tabs and FPC workflow working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings (non-critical): <span> cannot be child of <tbody>/<tr>. These are dev-mode warnings that don't affect functionality.

fpc_projects.ce_fail_when_not_ready: PASS - POST generate-ce returns 400 with blockers

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in TracciabilitaPage (span inside tbody) - low priority, doesn't affect functionality but should be fixed eventually by restructuring the render logic
